feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: Yeah, I don't like birthday parties, either
entry.content: Yeah, I don't like birthday parties, either

entry.title: Doze a-holes cain't leaf. Who're we gonna steal from now?
entry.content: Doze a-holes cain't leaf. Who're we gonna steal from now?

entry.title: Just searched and found the original video.
entry.content: Just searched and found the original video.

entry.title: And actually shout it at least once a day
They all look alike to me now
entry.content: They all look alike to me now

entry.title: Pacquiao vs. De La Hoya Doggy Style
entry.content: Pacquiao vs. De La Hoya Doggy Style

entry.title: These are the people why they have to put hot on hot coffee
I will reincarnate to make your life a living hell
Don't threaten me with a good time
Just in time for Independence Day
Happy #Stolzmonat @Retard4AOC. YOUR president is proud of your efforts
Happy Stolzmonat to everyone in the LGHDTV community
Stolzmonat is the best way to ruin redalertretards day :trollface:
Pick your fighter. Fight degeneracy with patriotism
The way they collapse when some random people refuse to participate in their delusions
When you see something genuinely wild. but it's the internet.
“When you look at the dark side, careful you must be. For the dark side looks back.”
Special place in hell for these people.
When u are just that upset at someone:
The job that does require exactly one dog
entry.content: The job that does require exactly one dog

entry.title: I wouldn't put it past the bastard.
We gonna need a bigger Cat
A wizard’s beard is neither early or late but arrives precisely when it wants to
Too much meat. Not enough mayo.
I awaken each morning and take in the day's news
I can see the universe in her eyes
Asmongold read the UK's Independent Gang Rape Inquiry Report in it's entirety- over 7 hrs long
Not sure what this is other than truly weird, or where it's from, perhaps Hell, but I just can't stop watching it
entry.content: Not sure what this is other than truly weird, or where it's from, perhaps Hell, but I just can't stop watching it

entry.title: That's what you use to stay fresh
Remember when I predicted the Democrats would sabotage it ?
What kind of game are we playing with ourselves
It's illegal for poll workers to ask for ID and it's legal for any non-citizen to vote. And this makes sense to Democrats.
You chose that man though. Always need that attention too
"Billions of people living their lives, oblivious."
